heading: Certain contracts limited to appropriated amounts
label: 6303 Certain contracts limited to appropriated amounts
text: A contract to erect, repair, or furnish a public building, or to make any public improvement, shall not be made on terms requiring the Federal Government to pay more than the amount specifically appropriated for the activity covered by the contract.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)630341:12.R.S. § 3733.The words “the activity covered by the contract” are substituted for “the specific purpose” for clarity.
